title: IBM Carbon Design System — Universal Patterns (link index only)
description: Official deep links + Carbon overview summaries (English). Full docs © IBM; visit URLs for diagrams and specs.

patterns.title: Common actions
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Frequently used actions that appear multiple times across different components and workflows.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 组合 BusinessButton / 菜单等业务组件完成重复操作；遵循对应 *.spec.json 与 .cursorrules。

patterns.title: Dialogs
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Prompted when the system needs input from the user or to give the user urgent information concerning their current workflow.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 模态与确认流：优先使用封装后的 Dialog/Sheet 与预设文案策略；勿散落原生 dialog。

patterns.title: Disabled states
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Used to completely remove the interactive function of a component.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 通过组件 disabled/readOnly 等语义表达禁用；勿仅用样式假装禁用。

patterns.title: Disclosures
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Used to disclose additional content or information about part of a UI.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 折叠/展开附加信息时用封装 Disclosure/Collapsible；保持焦点与可访问性。

patterns.title: Empty states
patterns.officialSummaryEn: How to address moments in an app where there is no data to display to the user.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 空列表/无数据时用统一空状态模板（文案 + 主操作）；与 DataTable/Business 组件一致。

patterns.title: Filtering
patterns.officialSummaryEn: The mechanism by which a user adds or removes data items from a displayed data set.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 筛选与表格联动：状态上升、受控筛选控件；大数据仍走 DataTable 语义。

patterns.title: Forms
patterns.officialSummaryEn: A group of related input controls that allows users to provide data or configure options.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 表单组合 BusinessInput、Checkbox 等；校验与标签策略对齐业务 spec。

patterns.title: Global header
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Covers using UI Shell components for within and between product navigation; introduces techniques for achieving consistency in products.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 顶栏/侧栏导航一致性：用布局壳与路由约定；不在业务页重复造多套 header。

patterns.title: Loading
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Used when information takes an extended amount of time to process and appear on screen.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 长耗时操作用 Skeleton/Spinner 与禁用二次提交；避免空白闪烁。

patterns.title: Login
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Allows a user to gain access to an application by entering their user ID and password.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 登录与凭证流程遵循安全与错误提示规范；输入控件用封装组件。

patterns.title: Notifications
patterns.officialSummaryEn: An important method of communicating with users and providing feedback.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 全局反馈：toast/banner 与严重级别策略；与 notification 类 Business 组件一致。

patterns.title: Read-only inputs
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Inputs for form components that users can review but not modify.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 只读展示用 readOnly/纯文本策略；勿把可编辑控件伪装成只读。

patterns.title: Search
patterns.officialSummaryEn: An intuitive method of discovery, offering users a way to explore a website or application using keywords.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 搜索与查询：Input + 防抖/空状态；结果区与筛选、表格的分工清晰。

patterns.title: Text toolbar
patterns.officialSummaryEn: A set of buttons and menus that allows users to edit text.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 富文本工具条：成组操作与快捷键；按钮仍走 BusinessButton 等封装。
